summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SpoedKlus MVP - Dutch emergency handyman booking platform. Fixed critical booking API bug and verified all core functionality including landing page, booking flow, registration, and payment integration.

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown option selection has interaction issues - options are visible but clicking fails

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and services
Service cards display correct pricing (regular and emergency)
Navigation from service cards to booking page works
Complete 4-step booking flow with emergency toggle
Login functionality with proper error handling
